subcodes.first_line: All praise be to God that thou hast attained unto acceptance and turned thy face toward the Most Exalted Horizon. Today the world is illumined by the lights of the dawning Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد باقبال فائز گشتی و بافق اعلی توجه نمودی امروز عالم بانوار فجر ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
